subcodes.first_line: O Javad! Verily, We have desired to cause the Kawthar of Life to flow forth for thee in this Tablet, whereby life was bestowed upon all who dwell therein [3.5s]... ...Glory be unto Thee, O Thou Who art the Lord of all creation and King of things visible and invisible! I entreat Thee by Him Who is the Desire of the heavens and earth
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا جواد اردنا ان نجری لک کوثر الحیوان فی اللوح الذی به علق حیوه من فی
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
